title: Subscribe to mags
content:
Subscribe to mags
Watch reality TV
headlines catchphrases
Model ocial profiles
Study Facebook
Tweets statuses
Random advertisements randomly placed

MUST READ CRITICAL THEORY ON META AND ON TECH

The word has been unarmed, some guns still exist but are rare. The gods have guns. The people use mostly makeshift weaponry.
Animals are scarce, only licensed hunters can hunt
Split into factions; those who embrace technology and those that don't

Audition people on fb to use as descriptions for characters and to emulate their pictures and profiles

Use the names of the people (romanize them???)

Emulate the internet experience:
Threads/message boards
Comments
Tweets in less than 140 words

Extremism vs.... Multiple levels of isms and factions

First middle class society

Can function on all drugs
Dating profile

Click bait
